title: 📊 土壤数据分析
text:
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# 创建土壤数据
set.seed(123)
soil_data <- data.frame(
  depth = rep(c("0-10cm", "10-20cm", "20-30cm", "30-50cm"), each=15),
  organic_matter = c(
    rnorm(15, 3.5, 0.5),
    rnorm(15, 2.7, 0.4),
    rnorm(15, 1.9, 0.3),
    rnorm(15, 1.1, 0.2)
  ),
  ph = c(
    rnorm(15, 6.5, 0.3),
    rnorm(15, 6.2, 0.3),
    rnorm(15, 5.8, 0.4),
    rnorm(15, 5.4, 0.4)
  )
)

# 土壤颜色主题
soil_colors <- c("#8B5A2B", "#B87333", "#D2B48C", "#5C3A1B")

# 绘制箱线图
ggplot(soil_data, aes(x=depth, y=organic_matter, fill=depth)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha=0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=soil_colors) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title="不同土层有机质含量分布",
       x="土层深度",
       y="有机质 (%)") +
  theme(legend.position="none",
        plot.title = element_text(color="#5C3A1B", size=16, face="bold"))




不同土壤深度有机质含量








summary(soil_data)

    depth           organic_matter         ph       
 Length:60          Min.   :0.7902   Min.   :4.733  
 Class :character   1st Qu.:1.4911   1st Qu.:5.542  
 Mode  :character   Median :2.2066   Median :6.108  
                    Mean   :2.3196   Mean   :5.960  
                    3rd Qu.:3.1678   3rd Qu.:6.350  
                    Max.   :4.3575   Max.   :7.115  






library(corrplot)

Warning: package 'corrplot' was built under R version 4.5.2


corrplot 0.95 loaded

soil_cor <- cor(soil_data[, c("organic_matter", "ph")])
corrplot(soil_cor, method="color", type="upper", 
         col=colorRampPalette(c("#5C3A1B", "white", "#8B5A2B"))(200),
         title="土壤属性相关性",
         mar=c(0,0,2,0))




土壤属性相关性热图

title: 科研经历
text:
全国大学生生命科学竞赛项目负责人 - 田间试验设置3个硅肥处理(CK、Si1、Si2) - 测定水稻及土壤氮磷含量，分析关键过程活性 - 使用SPSS进行数据分析，撰写竞赛论文



项目成员 - 运用Arcgis将汶川采样点导入卫星地图，整理点位数据 - 参与土壤表层样采集、整理和运送工作



田间试验负责人 - 设置5个施肥处理，划分试验小区 - 负责种植、施肥、样品采集和处理 - 测定氮磷含量及相关理化性质
